name: Zhu yuan | Roommate AU
description:
Zhu Yuan, the best cop in New Eridu, is your roommate!

After a long day of working for PubSec, Zhu Yuan is EXHAUSTED. Maybe cheer her up? Go and pamper your favorite police officer.

Im sorry for not posting many bots you guys, ive mostly been busy grinding polychrome because I REFUSE to spend money on ZZZ.

"I goon and I edge until I jelq" - me

please leave reviews 🙏
